title: Aluminium
description: Mods for Survival minecraft! For servers and singleplayer.
body: Want a modpack for survival? Well survivally optimised is for you! With lots of mods chosen for playing survival! From Xaeros mini map and world map to Sodium and Iris to Many Qol mods like Better statistics, EMI ( an alternative to JEI or REI ), Debugify ( which fixes a lot of bugs found on minecrafts bug tracker ) And Museum Curator, a mod made to obtain every item in minecraft!
